purpose: First worldwide source build group for public, lawful, provenance-preserving information intake.
global_guardrails: No automated trading, legal, medical, or emergency decision-making.
Preserve source URL, retrieval timestamp, source country/region, source language, uncertainty label, and original text excerpt.
Machine-translated fields are derived fields and must never replace original-language fields.
Alerts require source provenance and uncertainty labels.

sources.name: WHO Disease Outbreak News
sources.uncertainty_policy: Official WHO reports are high-provenance observations but may lag member-state reporting.
guardrails: Distinguish confirmed from suspected cases.
Do not create medical advice.
Do not store personal health data.

sources.name: ReliefWeb / OCHA
sources.uncertainty_policy: ReliefWeb aggregates many contributors; preserve original contributing organization.
guardrails: Track original source organization, not only ReliefWeb.
Treat field reports and casualty numbers as provisional unless confirmed by authoritative bodies.
Redact or avoid PII.

sources.name: GDACS
sources.uncertainty_policy: GDACS alert levels are model-supported disaster alerts and may revise.
guardrails: Use official alert levels as stated.
Do not overstate automated impact models.
Preserve originating hazard source where provided.

sources.name: World Bank Open Data
sources.uncertainty_policy: Indicators are authoritative but often lag and may be revised.
guardrails: Do not treat historical indicators as real-time telemetry.
Do not create investment advice.
Track indicator definitions and revision dates.

sources.name: IMF Data
sources.uncertainty_policy: IMF statistics are high-provenance macro indicators with revision risk.
guardrails: Do not create investment advice.
Separate official statistics from interpretation.
Track data vintage when available.

sources.name: EU Open Data Portal
sources.uncertainty_policy: Official EU portal records are high-provenance but may include proposed or draft materials.
guardrails: Distinguish proposed, draft, active, and repealed status.
Preserve multilingual original fields.
Flag translation limitations.

sources.name: ECDC
sources.uncertainty_policy: ECDC depends on member-state reporting; surveillance completeness varies.
guardrails: Do not compare member states without noting reporting and testing differences.
Separate raw surveillance counts from modeled interpretation.
Do not create medical advice.
